infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Dealish uses your location to show nearby restaurants with active deals on the map and sort them by distance from you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Dealish uses your location to show nearby restaurants with active deals on the map and sort them by distance from you.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Dealish uses your camera to scan QR codes at restaurants so you can redeem deals at checkout.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Dealish accesses your photo library so restaurant owners can upload hero photos of their restaurant (storefront, dishes, interior) when creating or editing their listing.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Dealish saves QR codes you generate for your restaurant deals to your photo library so you can print or share them.

plugins.cameraPermission: Dealish uses your camera to scan QR codes at restaurants so you can redeem deals at checkout.
